name: Shrimp and Cheddar Snacks
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces broken shrimp, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cheddar cheese and mayonnaise in a bowl.
2. Add the rinsed and drained shrimp, finely chopped onion, and garlic powder to the bowl with the cheese and mayonnaise.
3. Mix all ingredients well until combined.
4. Spread one tablespoon of the mixture evenly over each slice of toasted snack rye bread.
5. Place the prepared slices on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 7-9 minutes, or until the tops are bubbly and lightly browned.
7. Serve hot.
Yield: 3-1/2 dozen
